q: What cloud platforms do you support?
a: We primarily support Amazon Web Services (AWS), along with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and Microsoft Azure for specific multi-cloud workloads.
Yes, we provide full AWS consulting services including architecture design, serverless setups, cost audits, and performance tuning.

q: Can you build custom AI applications?
a: Absolutely. We build custom generative AI tools, speech/voice intelligence services, and machine learning pipelines integrated into your existing workflows.
Yes, we design robust CI/CD pipelines, containerized environments using Docker and Kubernetes, and automated infrastructure as code using Terraform.

q: Do you provide managed cloud support?
a: Yes, we offer 24/7 proactive monitoring, security patch management, backup strategies, and incident response agreements.

q: Can you migrate existing applications to AWS?
a: Yes, we conduct full workload discovery and migrate legacy servers, applications, and databases securely to AWS with minimal downtime.

q: How does the engagement process work?
a: We start with a technical discovery call, draft an architecture or implementation roadmap, execute in milestones, and deliver with hands-on handover support.

q: Do you work with startups and enterprises?
a: Yes, we scale our designs to support both early-stage startups seeking rapid MVPs and established enterprises demanding high security and compliance.

q: How long does a typical project take?
a: Cloud infrastructure and migrations take 2–4 weeks; complex AI integration and custom SaaS platforms take 6–12 weeks.
